_comment: Custom validation rules beyond the schema (Phase 4). This file is loaded but not yet consumed — Phase 4 will read these rules. Documented here so authors can start drafting them.

rules.description: Every CalculatedMetric must have exactly one IsCalculatedBy relationship.
Every Model's input_variables list must be non-empty.
Quantitative metrics must have a unit other than 'N/A'.
DirectMetric and CalculatedMetric must have a code that matches the framework's pattern (e.g. FN-CB-230a.1).
